title: myrtopsis sellingii
intro: Myrtopsis sellingii, also known as the South Korean white myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Myrtopsis sellingii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used in traditional remedies to address various health concerns.
